name: pty-mgr
description: PTY session manager with terminal emulation for programmatic session control.

scripts.build:all: bun build bin/pty-mgr.mjs --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/pty-mgr-linux-x64 && bun build bin/pty-mgr.mjs --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/pty-mgr-linux-arm64 && bun build bin/pty-mgr.mjs --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/pty-mgr-darwin-x64 && bun build bin/pty-mgr.mjs --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/pty-mgr-darwin-arm64
